summary: Iteration 210: Intake Learning (hub-wide Giovanni-style BC + Spiro learning) - All tests passed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (6 unit + 18 API). Frontend: IntakeLearningPage and IntakeLearningPanel both render correctly with proper KPIs, cold-start detection, and actionable findings display.
critical_code_review_comments: sales_intake_learning_service.py: Well-structured orchestrator with clear separation of concerns. LEARNING_DOC_TYPES set properly includes sales_invoice for Giovanni pattern.
intake_learning.py router: Clean REST API design with proper 404 handling for missing docs/staging records.
IntakeLearningPage.js: Good use of data-testid attributes for testing. KPIs display correctly with proper formatting.
IntakeLearningPanel.jsx: Handles all three states (empty, skipped, learned) with transparent cold-start messaging as requested.
InventoryImportsPage.js: IntakeLearningPanel properly integrated at top of staging detail drawer.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing staging records for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 210 verified the hub-wide Giovanni-style BC + Spiro intake learning feature. All new /api/intake/* endpoints work correctly. IntakeLearningPage at /intake/learning shows KPIs (6 eligible docs, 6 with insights, 6 cold-start, 50/54 XLS staging). IntakeLearningPanel renders in InventoryImportsPage staging drawer with proper cold-start messaging. Regression tests confirm existing endpoints (/api/inside-sales-pilot/documents, /api/inventory-xls/staging, /api/inventory-ledger/health-summary) still work.

intake_learning_endpoints: GET /api/intake/learning/summary - PASS (returns hub, xls_staging, top_customers with correct shape)
cold_start_detection: XLS staging with customer but no BC history shows cold_start=true - PASS
cold_start_reason is populated with transparent message - PASS
scope_gating: doc_type 'Other' is skipped with skip_reason - PASS (unit test)
SALES_INVOICE doc_type is IN scope - PASS (unit test)
frontend_ui: KPIs display correctly (Eligible Docs, With Insights, Cold Start, Actionable, Bounds Violations, XLS Staging) - PASS
Refresh, Backfill, Force re-run buttons visible - PASS
Top Customers table renders (empty state when no learned customers) - PASS
Flagged for Review section renders - PASS
IntakeLearningPanel renders in InventoryImportsPage staging drawer - PASS
Cold-start notice displays with reason - PASS

notes: All features working as expected. Cold-start customers transparently show 'no BC learning yet' message with reason. The 'pilot' framing has been removed from UI - now shows 'Intake Learning' as hub-wide feature. BC writes are OFF (read-only learning).
